40__OFF_the_Nike_Solo_Swoosh_Crewneck__T.name: NIKE SOLO SWOOSH CREWNECK — THUNDER BLUE
40__OFF_the_Nike_Solo_Swoosh_Crewneck__T.description:
Nike Solo Swoosh crewneck sweatshirt in thunder blue — minimalist athletic pullover.

Key features:
• Thunder blue fleece upper.
• Small white Nike swoosh on chest.
• Ribbed crew neck, cuffs and hem.
• Soft brushed interior.
• Everyday sportswear staple.

Available sizes M–3XL. Prince Esquire casual streetwear.
